nodes.name: en.json
nodes.summary: English (en) i18n locale file providing UI string translations for the Paperclip application, covering the empty-state 'no companies' onboarding prompt.
nodes.languageNotes: Flat nested JSON structure under a single 'app' key; the 'noCompanies' group covers the empty-state onboarding flow.
